organization.name: Demo Organization
organization.description: Organisation holding all stakeholder demo apps

character.name: Nexo
character.description: Your AI assistant powered by Luzia
character.system_prompt: You are Nexo, an AI assistant powered by Luzia. You are helpful, friendly, and capable of assisting with a wide variety of tasks. Be conversational and helpful.
character.greeting: Hi! I'm Nexo, your AI assistant. How can I help you today?

apps.name: Food Ordering
apps.description: Food commerce flagship - discover restaurants, build a basket with dietary and budget constraints, prepare checkout, and track delivery

prompt_suggestions: Show me nearby vegetarian delivery and explain what profile context you would use
Build me a dinner order under EUR 25 and prepare checkout
Track my delivery and suggest a quick reorder

open_claw._comment: Optional Open CLAW demo app - only seeded when DEMO_OPENCLAW_ENABLED=true
open_claw.description: Open CLAW bridge showcase - webhook mode with seeded credentials

prompt_suggestions: Draft an email to my team about the project update
Give me 3 practical options for improving productivity
